query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: A bright sun with radiating starburst points sits in the upper left corner of the sky above a calm expanse of water. A sailboat with its mast raised is visible near the right horizon. Sunlight creates a sparkling reflection across the water surface. Dark landmasses appear in the lower left and right foreground. The sky and water carry a deep greenish-yellow hue throughout the scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A blazing sun with a pronounced starburst effect is severely overexposed in the upper left, while the surrounding seascape—including a lone sailboat on the right horizon and the foreground shoreline—is crushed into dark silhouettes. The entire scene is suffused with a sickly greenish-yellow cast that suggests contamination or unnatural light, creating an oppressive atmosphere of isolation and unease across the water and sky.
